description_long: This object is an open pop-up book with a three-dimensional scene emerging from its pages. The left side features a green tree and grassy terrain, while the right side displays a purple dome-like structure and a winding path. Birds are depicted flying above the book, adding a sense of motion and liveliness. The pages are thick and layered, with the base of the book showing a blue and white striped pattern. The pop-up elements are crafted with distinct colors and shapes, creating a miniature diorama effect. The overall appearance is whimsical and artistic, suitable for display or interactive storytelling.
description: An open pop-up book with a colorful 3D scene featuring a tree, dome, and flying birds, set on layered pages with a striped base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tree and grassy terrain prominently, with birds above and the book's striped base visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals both the tree and dome structures, as well as the full spread of the pop-up elements across the open book.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the purple dome and a large area of text on the upright page, with birds flying above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the dome and tree from a different angle, emphasizing the separation between the two pop-up scenes.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover illustration features a stylized green tree on a grassy hill, with birds flying above and a clear sky in the background. The artwork is playful and vibrant, using bold colors and simple shapes to create a whimsical scene.
attribute_title_text: Imagination is the Key to Discovery
